questions.question: Describe the main concerns surrounding the use of artificial intelligence in decision-making for credit risk assessment in financial services. (15 marks)

An AI system is used to detect and prevent money laundering in a financial institution. However, the system incorrectly flags a legitimate customer as a high-risk individual. What should the financial institution do? (10 marks)
Explain how AI bias can occur in the development of an algorithm used to determine interest rates for loans in financial services. (12 marks)
